jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services in Dhanbad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute Holdings Services!
